subcodes.first_line: Through God's grace and mercy, His bounty and His bestowal, We have risen this day and were engaged in utterance and remembrance when the Greater Branch arrived [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اصبحنا الیوم بنعمه الله و رحمته و فضله و عطائه و کنا ناطقا ذاکرا اذا ورد غصنی الاکبر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @predictions and prophecies
